title.rationale: Canonical identifier of the research work.

year.rationale: Provides context for the research within its field.

abstract.rationale: Offers a concise overview of the research objectives and findings.

doi.rationale: Unique identifier for accessing the paper online.

venue.rationale: Indicates the platform where the research is published.

introduction.rationale: Sets the stage for the research question and context.

background.rationale: Provides necessary context for understanding the research.

problem_statement.description: Specific problem addressed in the paper
problem_statement.rationale: Clarifies the main issue the research aims to solve.

methodology.rationale: Details the approach taken to conduct the research.

survey.rationale: Describes how data was collected from participants.

participants.rationale: Provides insight into the sample population.

questions.description: List of questions asked in the survey
questions.rationale: Shows the focus areas of the survey.

data_analysis.description: Methods used for analyzing survey data
data_analysis.rationale: Explains how the data was processed and interpreted.

results.rationale: Summarizes key outcomes of the study.

quantitative_results.rationale: Provides statistical insights into survey responses.

discussion.rationale: Interprets findings and contextualizes them within the field.

barriers.description: Identified barriers to conducting error analysis

enabling_factors.description: Factors that could facilitate error analysis
enabling_factors.rationale: Suggests ways to improve research practices.

conclusion.rationale: Summarizes the main takeaways and suggests next steps.

irb_approval.description: Indicates if IRB approval was obtained
irb_approval.rationale: Confirms ethical oversight of the study.

participant_privacy.description: Measures taken to protect participant privacy
participant_privacy.rationale: Ensures confidentiality and respect for participants.

reproducibility_metadata.description: Metadata related to reproducibility of the research
reproducibility_metadata.rationale: Supports the transparency and replicability of findings.

code_availability.rationale: Facilitates verification and reuse of methods.

data_availability.rationale: Enables other researchers to replicate the study.
